Class EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<T extends EfsIntervalEndpoint>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.feed.EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - interval endpoint subclass.
Direct Known Subclasses:
EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder, EfsIndexEndpoint.Builder, EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder
Enclosing class:
EfsIntervalEndpoint
protected abstract static class EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<T extends EfsIntervalEndpoint> extends Object
Base class for all endpoint builders. Contains endpoint clusivity setting and interval location.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    CLUSIVITY_NULL
    When attempting to set endpoint clusivity to null, then NullPointerException contains message "clusivity is null".
    static final String
    LOCATION_NULL
    When attempting to set endpoint location to null, then NullPointerException contains message "location is null".
    protected EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity
    mClusivity
    Endpoint is either inclusive or exclusive.
    protected EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation
    mLocation
    Endpoint is either in the past, now, or in the future.
    protected final EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointType
    mType
    Specified endpoint type: fixed time, time offset, or index offset.

  • Field Details

    • CLUSIVITY_NULL

      public static final String CLUSIVITY_NULL
      When attempting to set endpoint clusivity to null, then NullPointerException contains message "clusivity is null".

    • LOCATION_NULL

      public static final String LOCATION_NULL
      When attempting to set endpoint location to null, then NullPointerException contains message "location is null".
      See Also:

    • mType

      protected final EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointType mType
      Specified endpoint type: fixed time, time offset, or index offset.

    • mClusivity

      protected EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity mClusivity
      Endpoint is either inclusive or exclusive.

    • mLocation

      protected EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation mLocation
      Endpoint is either in the past, now, or in the future.

  • Constructor Details

    • EndpointBuilder

      protected EndpointBuilder(EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointType type)
      Creates an endpoint builder for given endpoint type.
      Parameters:
      type - endpoint type.

  • Method Details

    • buildImpl

      protected abstract T buildImpl()
      Returns a newly constructed endpoint. Builder settings are validated as correct.
      Returns:
      endpoint based on this builder's validated settings.

    • build

      public final T build()
      Returns a new endpoint constructed from this builder's settings.
      Returns:
      new endpoint instance.
      Throws:
      net.sf.eBus.util.ValidationException - if this builder instance contains invalid settings.

    • validate

      protected net.sf.eBus.util.Validator validate(net.sf.eBus.util.Validator problems)
      Verifies that clusivity and location are set.
      Parameters:
      problems - append invalid setting messages to this list.
      Returns:
      problems.
